title: AI Engineer
company_focus: Next-generation trading and portfolio management technology
description:
Quick Facts

- Role: AI Engineer
- Location: 5 days/week @ NYC HQ
- Base salary: $200K to $325K
- Equity: aggressive initial grant + annual performance-based
  bonuses

About Moment

Moment builds next-generation trading and portfolio
management technology. Our core product suite includes high-
throughput market data pipelines, automated smart order
routing algorithms, real-time portfolio ledgering and
position tracking, and high-cardinality portfolio
optimization.



Founded in 2023 by a team of quant traders and researchers
from Citadel and Jane Street, we've raised over $100M in
capital from Andreessen Horowitz, Index Ventures, and
Lightspeed Venture Partners and now power mission critical
workflows for financial institutions with over $8T+ of
assets.

The Role

You’ll be pioneering what applied AI looks like at Moment.
You’ll work closely with design, product, platform, and
product engineering to bring thoughtful AI solutions to life
from 0-1 and define what AI looks like at Moment.

What you’ll do…

- Deeply understand the product and partner with teams to
  build truly value-additive AI automation.
- Judiciously determine which of the latest advancements in AI
  are worth applying at Moment.
- Build, deploy and evangelize AI primitives that will help
  our teams move faster internally, or bring 10x better
  experiences for our users.

You're a good fit if you're...

- Familiar with working on AI Agents and the applications of
  AI Agents.
- Interested in keeping up with the quickly moving landscape
  of AI and AI tooling.
- A product minded engineer that is willing to touch any part
  of the tech stack to self-serve.
- Experienced in working with distributed systems.
- Willing to spend the time and effort to deeply understanding
  our customers’ workflows.
- Someone who enjoy working in a fast-paced environment.

Even better if you have experience with...

- AI development techniques & frameworks
  - RAG
  - Prompt Engineering
  - MCP
  - Agent Skills
  - Durable Workflows
  - LLMs
- Go, Python, or Typescript.
- Are an ex-founder or an early engineer at a startup

Benefits

- Health, dental, and vision coverage.
- Team Events
- Social Budgets
- Free lunch and dinner.
responsibilities: Deeply understand the product and partner with teams to build truly value-additive AI automation
Judiciously determine which of the latest advancements in AI are worth applying at Moment
Build, deploy and evangelize AI primitives that will help teams move faster internally
Bring 10x better experiences for users through AI solutions
Work with distributed systems to implement AI solutions
Deeply understand customers' workflows to develop impactful AI applications
use_cases: Automated trading and smart order routing with AI assistance
Real-time portfolio optimization using AI-driven insights
High-throughput market data processing enhanced with AI automation
Internal AI primitives to accelerate team workflows and development
AI-powered workflow automation for financial institutions managing $8T+ assets
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role involves building, deploying, and evangelizing AI
primitives including AI Agents, RAG systems, and LLM
applications. The engineer will directly work on
implementing these AI solutions and determining which AI
advancements to apply, which is hands-on AI/ML development
work rather than supporting infrastructure.
